title: Typeform email and phone integrations
excerpt: HI, i was wondering when we can expect integrations for phone numbers and address on monday via typeform submissions

posts.author: Ash-Baymoor (Ash-Baymoor)
posts.cookedHtml: HI, i was wondering when we can expect integrations for phone numbers and address on monday via typeform submissions

posts.author: cdimamaglow (cdimamaglow)
posts.cookedHtml: Agreed. This is ridiculous. It’s just a number. Please prioritize this integration. Thank you!

posts.author: cdimamaglow (cdimamaglow)
posts.cookedHtml: This is still not done and it’s been years!! It’s just numbers!!!
